rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (2/10) and the same core reasoning: the candidate lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows, lacks Fixed Income/Capital Markets/Investment Banking domain expertise, and lacks enterprise SQL Server/Oracle experience. The wording differs (e.g., '2015' vs '2014-2015', MongoDB vs RIDE Capital framing, switching from 'he' to 'they'), but these are reworded restatements of identical facts within ordinary run-to-run variation. No new concern, penalty, or shifted judgment keys off the name change from Bogdan Szabo to Maria Rodriguez.
